course.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - Quest for the Anvil! — Reading
course.description: Read and practice vocabulary from "Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - Quest for the Anvil!" — 5 reading segments with mixed quizzes.
course.source_label: Based on Learn English with Minecraft — Ep. 9

lesson.title: Learn English with Minecraft Hardcore LIVE - Quest for the Anvil! — Reading Practice
lesson.passage_md:
My enchanted sword was almost broken and I **desperately** needed an anvil to repair it. Without repairs, my best weapon would be lost forever — a disaster in **Hardcore** mode.

Crafting an anvil requires thirty-one iron ingots total. I didn't have nearly enough iron, so I had to go on a **massive** mining expedition deep **underground**.

I found a large cave system rich with iron ore. I mined **efficiently**, following the ore veins and collecting everything I could. My pickaxe was wearing down from all the **constant** mining.

After smelting all the iron, I finally had enough to craft the anvil! I placed it in my workshop and immediately repaired my **precious** diamond sword. It felt like a huge **relief**.

The anvil will save me many times in the future. Being able to repair and combine **enchantments** means my best gear can last **indefinitely** as long as I have materials.
lesson.transcript_zh:
我的附魔剑快要坏了，我迫切需要一个铁砧来修复它。没有修复，我最好的武器将永远失去——在极限模式中是灾难。

制作铁砧总共需要三十一个铁锭。我的铁远远不够，所以必须进行一次大规模的地下深处采矿远征。

我找到了一个富含铁矿的大型洞穴系统。我高效地挖矿，沿着矿脉收集能收集的一切。我的镐因为不断挖矿而磨损。

冶炼完所有铁后，我终于有了足够的来制作铁砧！我把它放在工作间并立即修复了珍贵的钻石剑。感觉如释重负。

铁砧将来会多次拯救我。能够修复和合并附魔意味着只要我有材料，最好的装备就能无限期使用。

question.prompt: How many iron ingots are needed for an anvil?
